task_goal: Delete the file 2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg from the Android filesystem located in the Pictures folder within the sdk_gphone_x86_64 storage area.
task_goal_rewrite: The file 2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg is successfully deleted from the Pictures folder within the shared external storage (/sdcard) corresponding to the sdk_gphone_x86_64 storage area of the Android device.

checkpoints.description: The file 2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg is no longer present in the Pictures folder of the Android device's shared external storage (/sdcard).
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot of the Pictures folder contents showing the absence of 2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg, or a file manager confirmation message indicating successful deletion of the specified file.

checkpoints.description: The storage area containing the Pictures folder is the shared external storage associated with the sdk_gphone_x86_64 label (UI label may vary, e.g., sdk_gphone64_arm64, but maps to /sdcard).
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing the storage location label displayed in the file manager that corresponds to the device's shared external storage (/sdcard) when accessing the Pictures folder.

success_rule: Success is confirmed when both required checkpoints are satisfied: the specified file is absent from the target Pictures folder, and the folder resides in the correct shared external storage area.
